title: IT Project Manager
description:
We are seeking a IT Project Manager to lead the planning and delivery of complex technology initiatives across infrastructure, applications, and digital transformation domains. You will partner with business stakeholders, technical teams, and vendors to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with strategic objectives.


Key Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end project delivery — from initiation and planning to execution, testing, and handover.
  • Manage project scope, timelines, risks, budgets, and resources across multiple workstreams.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define requirements and translate business needs into actionable plans.
  • Track project progress, report KPIs and status updates to senior management, and ensure transparent communication.
  • Identify and mitigate risks, issues, and dependencies proactively.
  • Drive adherence to governance, compliance, and change management standards.
  • Build strong stakeholder relationships and manage vendor engagements effectively.
  • Promote best practices in Agile and hybrid project management methodologies.

What We’re Looking For

  • Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field; PMP, PRINCE2, or Agile certification preferred.
  • 8+ years of IT project management experience delivering mid to large-scale enterprise projects.
  • Proven success in managing cross-functional technology projects (infrastructure, applications, or cloud).
  • Strong understanding of application project lifecycle management, budget control, and vendor coordination.
  • Excellent leadership, stakeholder engagement, and communication skills.
  • Results-driven, organized, and comfortable operating in fast-paced, evolving environments.

postedCompany.description:
Newtone Consulting is an IT recruitment and sourcing specialist, delivering tailored talent solutions since 2013. We partner with organisations to identify, select, and onboard the right IT professionals.

With deep expertise across the IT landscape, we recruit for a wide range of roles, from functional business analysts to highly specialised technical architects. Our consultants bring strong IT backgrounds and years of recruitment experience, enabling them to understand complex technical requirements and match them with the right talent efficiently and accurately.

We work with leading multinational clients across banking, technology, fintech, industrial, infrastructure, and retail sectors, supporting their growth and critical digital initiatives through high-quality IT talent.
postedCompany.name: NEWTONE CONSULTING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
